sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented in available sources

special_mechanics.name: Weapon System
special_mechanics.description: Player can collect kitchen utensil weapons (spoon, fork, plate, frying pan, cooking pot) to attack food enemies. Basic attack and powered invincible attack modes.

special_mechanics.name: Health Items
special_mechanics.description: Health candy restores health. Health-extending lollipop increases maximum health capacity.

special_mechanics.name: Extra Lives
special_mechanics.description: Collectible extra life items scattered throughout levels.

tier_notes: Tier 3 - Empirical/Qualitative only. No physics values documented in available sources (TCRF and Wikipedia). Sources provide regional differences, level layout changes, character design changes, and development credits, but contain no movement parameters, gravity values, jump physics, or sub-pixel system data.
sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - Panic Restaurant
